text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Rice Shower and I visit an exhibition
held by one of her favorite picture book authors.
On the way back, we begin to chat.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you coming with me, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you coming with me, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I got to see that picture of the moonlit
beach. I loved the way the shadows were drawn.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that even shadows can be beautiful...
gives me strength.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can still see it when I close my eyes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Big Brother? Is... is this...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Big Sister? Is... is this...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-am I in the picture?! Wh-wh-what should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, someone's there... Um, excuse me—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! Is that... me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wait! I want to talk to you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
(But the way she runs... If only I could run like
that...)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
(...Hold on. If she's me, then that means I can run
that way too!)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: (One more step... Just a little more...)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I did it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Was... was I... dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Was... was I... dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-it's nothing. I was just thinking...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It would be nice if we could go and train now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod, and we head to the track. Mysteriously,
Rice Shower seems even more agile than usual.
